title: Ability to Organize Uploaded Files Into Folders
excerpt: It’s the “Files” feature that I’d like to see improvement to.  It would be extremely useful to be able to sort the documents that we upload into the “Files” section (next to Updates) into Folders.  We deal with contracts…

posts.author: Keri (Keri)
posts.cookedHtml:
It’s the “Files” feature that I’d like to see improvement to. It would be extremely useful to be able to sort the documents that we upload into the “Files” section (next to Updates) into Folders. We deal with contracts that are renewed every year and it would be nice to be able to sort the 2024 documents into a folder to keep them separate from the 2023 or 2025 documents. It gets really cluttered right now without a folder option.

I like the Updates especially now that we can make updates without it emailing everyone tied to that contract. I like to just make notes about current status or information for a future renewal. I don’t want those emailed, it’s nice to just have the notes there for reference.

But the Files section next to the Updates really need Folder options to help with organization.

Thank you for your consideration!

posts.author: anowacka (Anna from SolDevelo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Keri!

Maybe our Advanced File Gallery app could work for you? We just added collections there that allows you to categorize files added to items, but also search them and download with one click.

Let me know if you decided to give it a try - any feedback is highly appreciated

posts.author: Dmcgillic1 (Danielle Lawrence)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello! This didn’t seem to help in the way I need it to.

posts.author: anowacka (Anna from SolDevelo)
posts.cookedHtml: Can you tell me what exactly you were missing in the app? We’re constantly improving it so your feedback might be really helpful!

posts.author: Dmcgillic1 (Danielle Lawrence)
posts.cookedHtml: It seemed like I could only apply it to a board, instead of a record.

posts.author: anowacka (Anna from SolDevelo)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, currently it allows only to create folders on a board level, but we will investigate the topic of adding folders on the item level. Thank you for sharing your feedback

posts.author: anowacka (Anna from SolDevelo)
posts.cookedHtml: @Dmcgillic1 I just wanted to let you know that our Advanced File Gallery just got updated and you can create folders directly on the item level. If I understood correctly, you already had a trial of our app so if you would like to test it again - let me know, so I can extend the trial period for you

posts.author: Dmcgillic1 (Danielle Lawrence)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

Yes I would definitely like to try this out!

posts.author: Dmcgillic1 (Danielle Lawrence)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

Can you confirm when the free trial has been extended? I would like to use this ASAP.

Thank you!

posts.author: Dmcgillic1 (Danielle Lawrence)
posts.cookedHtml: Please confirm when my free trial has been extended. I would really like to use this, and I have replied to you with two emails (August 11th and August 13th) and two comments on this thread. Please advise ASAP. Thank you!
